---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a repository feature, workflow improvement, or new automation step
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What current limitation are you hitting.

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior.

## Workflow Context

- direct chat
- local script
- URL-driven generation
- template filling
- image insertion
- final styling

## Why It Matters

Explain the practical benefit.

## Extra Context

Add example prompts, commands, or sanitized templates if useful.
